TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Tjailjaking, title = Tjailjaking, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjailjaking} }

S.FORM: = Tjailjaking = Gaga mniq Pingtung Santimnsyang ka alang Tjailjaking. 240 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 875 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 820 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 55 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan84%, Rukai2%, Bunun1%, Puyuma1%, ni rahuq na o5%.
S.PHON: = tɟailɟakiŋ = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ santimnsjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟailɟakiŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, ɾukai*%, bunun*%, pujuma*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Tjailjaking = Gaga mniq Pingtung Santimnsyang ka alang Tjailjaking. 240 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 875 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 820 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 55 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan84%, Rukai2%, Bunun1%, Puyuma1%, ni rahuq na o5%.
S.PHON: = tɟailɟakiŋ = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ santimnsjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟailɟakiŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, ɾukai*%, bunun*%, pujuma*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
